source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.why_hot: A widely shared slogan emphasizing the role of sports in national strength, resonating with patriotic sentiment and the ongoing World Cup.
topics.share_angle: Discuss how sports development reflects national progress and inspires youth participation.

topics.chinese_topic: 注意防范暴雨、强对流天气
topics.official_english: Warning Issued for Heavy Rain and Severe Convective Weather
topics.why_hot: Severe weather alerts directly impact public safety and daily life, prompting widespread attention.
topics.share_angle: Explain the science behind convective weather and offer practical safety tips.

topics.chinese_topic: 世界杯看台频频出现日本旭日旗
topics.official_english: Rising Sun Flag Appears Frequently at World Cup Venues
topics.why_hot: The flag's controversial historical symbolism sparks debate over sports and politics.
topics.share_angle: Explore the historical context of the Rising Sun Flag and reactions from different countries.

topics.chinese_topic: 佛得角连续逼平两个世界冠军
topics.official_english: Cape Verde Holds Two World Champions to Draws
topics.why_hot: Underdog Cape Verde's surprising performance against top teams creates a compelling sports narrative.
topics.share_angle: Analyze Cape Verde's tactical approach and what this means for World Cup group dynamics.

topics.chinese_topic: 洲际导弹：不试则已 一试惊人
topics.official_english: Intercontinental Ballistic Missile: Impressive When Tested
topics.why_hot: Discussion of China's missile capabilities often ties to national security and technological pride.
topics.share_angle: Explain the significance of ICBM tests in global strategic balance and arms control.

topics.chinese_topic: 中方将10家美国实体列入管控名单
topics.official_english: China Places 10 US Entities on Export Control List
topics.why_hot: Trade and technology tensions between China and the US are of high public interest.
topics.share_angle: Break down the implications for global supply chains and tech competition.

topics.chinese_topic: “高考生因没考好跳河”系谣言
topics.official_english: Rumor: College Entrance Exam Student Jumped into River Due to Poor Scores Debunked
topics.why_hot: Rumors about exam stress resonate with millions of students and parents; debunking helps reduce panic.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the importance of verifying information and supporting students' mental health.

topics.chinese_topic: 蔡磊妻子谈渐冻症带来的经济压力
topics.official_english: Wife of ALS Patient Cai Lei Discusses Financial Burden of the Disease
topics.why_hot: ALS (渐冻症) is a rare disease that draws sympathy and raises awareness about healthcare costs.
topics.share_angle: Highlight the challenges faced by rare disease patients and the need for better support systems.
